project_type: Python + MQL5 algorithmic trading system (HF scalper for XAUUSD)
build_system: No formal build system - plain Python scripts with pytest for testing
test_framework: pytest with class-based test organization in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ and confirm 276+ tests pass (5 pre-existing failures in test_tick_collector.py are known/expected)
setup_instructions: pip install numpy pandas pytest (already installed)
environment_constraints: No MT5 terminal available, no Docker. Pure Python/file-based testing only. The tick file is UTF-16 encoded, written by EA.
contribution_requirements: New features go in separate module files. Tests added for new modules. Version bump in config.py, NeuroX_Types.mqh, NeuroX_EA_v9.mq5, update.bat, Start.bat
key_patterns: Each module is a standalone .py file imported by main.py. Config class in config.py holds all thresholds. TickCollector reads ticks from file, builds M1 bars. Momentum/signals computed from bars or raw ticks. Bridge writes signals to files for EA. Tests use sys.path.insert for imports and class-based organization with descriptive names.
directory_structure: Root: main.py (entry), config.py, momentum.py, tick_collector.py, intelligence.py, bridge.py, optimizer.py, performance.py. Include/: MQL5 header files. tests/: pytest test files. data/: data directory.
